response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned software engineer (15+ years) with strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, testing discipline, and recent hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling, which aligns with the role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience appears to span roughly one year; there is no demonstrated RAG, vector database, evaluation-pipeline, or multi-agent framework experience, and cloud exposure (AWS CDK) is present but not framed around AI system design. Strong engineer, weak match to the staff-level GenAI mandate.
strengths: 15+ years of broad, production software engineering across web, backend, and embedded systems
Current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, open-source projects, workshops, and mentoring
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of GenAI work)
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited demonstrated customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting experience

key_factors.factor: General engineering seniority and TypeScript expertise
